name: Multi-Agent Robotic Control with Onboard Vision-Language Models (2607.07403)
content: Vision Language Models (VLMs) and Vision Language Action (VLA) models have shown promise in robotic control. Yet, they face significant challenges regarding explainability, generalization, and compute requirements. This paper presents a Multi-Agent System (MAS) architecture that addresses these limitations by deploying specialized agents on onboard hardware - eliminating dependence on external compute. The system controls a multi-purpose autonomous mobile manipulator in a simulated industrial wa
summary: 该研究提出了一种基于自主硬件的多代理系统架构，用于解决视觉语言模型在机器人控制中的可解释性、泛化性和计算需求问题。
key_insights: 开发了专为自主硬件部署的多代理系统
使用紧凑型视觉语言模型进行任务执行
引入新的‘Megamind’协调器以缓解小型模型长期规划的问题
在AMD Ryzen(TM) AI mini PC上进行了硬件仿真验证
展示了该架构作为云依赖部署替代方案的有效性和成本效益
xihe_relevance: 对记忆系统和自反层有一定价值，但不直接关联。
